name: Hawaiian Fish with Thai Banana Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Season the fish with salt.
3. Place the seasoned fish in a baking dish.
4. Sprinkle coarsely chopped cilantro over the fish.
5. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
6. Turn off the oven when ready.
7. Serve hot with Thai banana salsa on the side.
